steps.title: Use the historical sequence
steps.content: The first sentence says Zhao made history by winning best director in 2021. The next sentence explains that before her, only Kathryn Bigelow had won, which shows why Zhao's win was historic.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice A makes Bigelow's earlier win a result of Zhao's. Choice C signals contrast where there is explanation. Choice D signals similarity, but the sentence gives prior context.

steps.title: Introduce prior context
steps.content: Previously correctly signals that Bigelow's win came before Zhao's and sets up the historical rarity of Zhao's award. The answer is B.
